Routine shakedown 4 Barracks ~2:30pm
Inmate Davis ADC#188432 acting nervous, kept looking at his bunk
Found small baggie of green leafy substance in mattress seam — ~2 grams
Also found a homemade tattoo gun (motor from CD player, needle, pen tube)
Davis said "man that ain't mine, somebody put that there"
Sgt Peterman took photos, bagged items
Chain of custody to Cpl Torres
Field test positive for THC
Davis placed in cuffs by Cpl Powell
Escorted to Restrictive Housing by Cpl Powell & Cpl Miller
Money receipt #4421 from Business Office ($23 found in Davis bunk)
Davis refused drug test
Lt Jameson (Shift Lt) authorized contraband seizure 2:45pm
